alert: PRODUCT RISK: The bundled toothbrush is the #1 complaint driver — six separate users call it 'harmful to gums' / 'dishwashing wire'. The paste's reputation is carrying a bad accessory. Counterfeits are the #2 threat: loyal users are warning each other ('the fake one causes cavities — check the box color').

timeline.t: Miss Qurunfula (dentist creator) reel goes live — instant loyalty wave in comments.
Long-time users surface en masse: '8 years', 'whole household', 'switched back after trying others'.
Counterfeit warnings appear from the community itself — fake box is lighter in color.
Fluoride debate splits the audience: fans buy BECAUSE it's fluoride-free, skeptics quit over it.
Dataset exported — zero brand replies recorded across all 217 comments.

variants.name: Clove (hero SKU)
variants.note: the identity of the brand — 'Miss Clove' memes carry the ad

variants.name: Charcoal variant
variants.note: spontaneous praise: 'the charcoal one is amazing and cheap'

variants.name: Price point (3,000 IQD)
variants.note: cited twice as a reason to buy — value is part of the product

variants.name: Original vs fake
variants.note: community verifies by box shade — brand has no official guide

channels.name: General retail (Iraq)
channels.note: counterfeits circulating in the same channel

channels.name: Instagram resellers
channels.note: @cosmatic_retal_212 plugged by a fan — unofficial, unverified

channels.name: International (Finland ask)
channels.note: 'Do they deliver to Finland?' — diaspora demand, no answer

channels.name: How-to-order
channels.note: 'How do we order it?' went unanswered — free purchase intent leaking

channelNote: Distribution reads healthy at pharmacy level, but every availability question in the thread went unanswered — and counterfeits share the shelf.
respQuality: 0 brand replies across 217 comments — a 0% response rate on a post with two direct purchase questions, six brush complaints, two counterfeit warnings and one viral-risk nausea complaint. The community is doing the brand's CS for free (peers answering peers); the brand is invisible in its own thread.

risks.title: Bundled toothbrush damaging trust (6 users)
risks.desc: Repeated, specific and physical: 'harmful for sensitive gums', 'it's dishwashing wire I swear', 'hurts so much I can't use it'. Every one of these sits under praise for the paste — the accessory is dragging the hero product.
risks.q: The paste is really good, but the brush is terrible — it's for dishes, not teeth
risks.sla: Product review this week; reply today
risks.reply: تحية طيبة 🙏 شكراً لملاحظتك — وصلت لفريق المنتج. ننصح باستخدام فرشاة ناعمة مع المعجون إذا كانت لثتك حساسة، وجاري تقييم الفرشاة المرفقة. رأيك يهمنا 🌿 (Thank you — this has reached our product team. If your gums are sensitive we recommend a soft-bristle brush with the paste; the bundled brush is under review.)

risks.title: Counterfeits eroding the franchise
risks.desc: Two loyalists independently warn the community: fakes exist, cause cavities and smell wrong; the tell is a lighter box. When customers invent your anti-counterfeit guide for you, the brand is late.
risks.q: Make sure you get the original — the fake one actually causes cavities and smells bad (the box color is lighter)
risks.reply: شكراً لتنبيه المجتمع ❤️ المنتج الأصلي يُباع في الصيدليات المعتمدة وعلبته بالألوان الغامقة الرسمية. سننشر دليل التحقق قريباً — وإذا صادفت منتجاً مقلداً راسلنا مباشرة. (Thank you for protecting the community — genuine product is sold in licensed pharmacies with the official deep-color box. Verification guide coming; DM us any counterfeit sightings.)

risks.title: Fluoride-free is splitting the audience
risks.desc: Informed users quit over it ('the most important anti-cavity ingredient — so I dropped it') while fans buy because of it. The brand is letting the comment section run its ingredient strategy debate unmoderated.
risks.q: If it's fluoride-free, why would I use it? I don't even rinse for 30 minutes after brushing, for the fluoride
risks.reply: سؤال ممتاز 🌿 تركيبتنا تعتمد على القرنفل والأعشاب للحماية الطبيعية، وهي خيار لمن يفضّل منتجاً خالياً من الفلورايد. لمن يرغب بالفلورايد لدينا خيارات أخرى ضمن عائلة دابر. (Great question — our formula uses clove and herbs for natural protection, made for those who prefer fluoride-free. Dabur's range also includes fluoride options.)

risks.title: Severe taste/nausea account, urging influencer to drop the ad
risks.desc: One vivid, emotional complaint (vomiting, day-long nausea) addressed to the creator by name. Low likes now, high virality potential if screenshot-shared. Needs private, empathetic CS outreach — not a public debate.
risks.q: The taste is unbearable… I threw up and spent the whole day nauseous. Fatouma, don't do this ad — there are far better options
risks.reply: (Private DM) نأسف جداً لتجربتك 💔 سلامتك أهم شيء عندنا — نرجو التواصل معنا لنفهم الحالة ونعوضك. (We're truly sorry about your experience — your wellbeing matters most. Please DM us so we can understand what happened and make it right.)

risks.title: Origin-based boycott comment (UAE production)
risks.desc: Single politically-motivated boycott call. Do not engage publicly — monitor for pickup; prepare a factual origin statement only if volume grows.
risks.q: Made in the UAE… so boycott

recos.title: Fix or drop the bundled toothbrush
recos.desc: Six organic complaints is a product signal, not noise. Either upgrade to a soft-bristle brush or unbundle — and say so publicly in the thread. Cheapest trust win available.

recos.title: Launch an authenticity campaign — own the 'check the box' rule
recos.desc: The community already invented the verification method (box shade). Formalize it: one reel with Miss Qurunfula showing real-vs-fake, pinned comment, pharmacy-channel poster. Counterfeit cavities are being blamed on YOUR brand.

recos.title: Publish the fluoride positioning FAQ
recos.desc: Two audiences, one product: 'natural/fluoride-free' fans and fluoride-loyal skeptics. Message the first, don't fight the second — point them to fluoride SKUs in the range. Stop losing informed users silently.

recos.title: Extend the Miss Qurunfula partnership
recos.desc: Trust metrics are exceptional — 'blind trust in you', 'I'll try it on your word'. She converted skeptics in one reel. Series format: real-vs-fake, brushing technique, kids' usage (asked twice), braces care (asked twice).

recos.title: Answer every purchase question within 24h
recos.desc: 'How do we order?' and 'Do they deliver to Finland?' died unanswered. Pin ordering info; route diaspora demand to e-commerce. This is free revenue on the floor.

recos.title: Weaponize the price point
recos.desc: 3,000 IQD is being praised organically vs imported pastes. 'Better than Crest/Sensodyne at a third of the price' is being written by users — echo it in creative.

takeaway: This is a beloved heritage product with a cult variant, a trusted face, and a price advantage — being undermined by three fixable things: a bad bundled brush, unpoliced counterfeits, and total brand silence in its own comment section. Fix the accessory, own authenticity, answer the thread — the love is already there.
